faq.a1: Ya, benar-benar. Paket Free gratis selamanya, tanpa batasan waktu dan tanpa kartu kredit. Bahkan 15 hari Pro juga gratis: kami tidak meminta data pembayaran. Setelah berakhir, jika Anda tidak memilih untuk beralih ke Pro, Anda akan otomatis kembali ke paket Free. Tidak ada biaya tersembunyi, tidak ada perpanjangan otomatis yang tidak diinginkan.
faq.a10: AdOff adalah salah satu ekstensi pemblokir iklan terbaik untuk Chrome pada 2026: menggabungkan pemblokiran tingkat jaringan (138 aturan), penyaringan kosmetik CSS, dan teknologi stealth anti-deteksi yang melewati dinding anti-adblock. Memblokir banner, pop-up, pelacak, dan iklan video, jauh lebih ringan daripada alternatif lain, dan gratis, dengan uji coba Pro 15 hari tanpa kartu kredit.
faq.a2: Ya, di semua platform streaming yang menggunakan standar iklan IMA. AdOff Pro mengganti SDK iklan dengan stub netral: pemutar menerima 'tidak ada iklan tersedia' dan video dimulai. Tanpa hitungan mundur, tanpa mid-roll. Pemblokiran iklan video memerlukan AdOff Pro, termasuk dalam uji coba gratis 15 hari.
faq.a3: Dengan Stealth Mode (termasuk dalam uji coba dan paket Pro), AdOff beroperasi di MAIN world browser dan menyamarkan setiap jejak. Mempalsukan variabel JavaScript yang digunakan untuk mendeteksi blocker, mencegat fetch pengujian ke server periklanan dan mensimulasikan elemen umpan yang diharapkan oleh situs. Hasilnya: sistem anti-adblock tidak menerima sinyal ekstensi aktif. Paket Gratis tidak menyertakan Stealth, jadi situs yang lebih agresif mungkin masih mendeteksinya.
faq.a4: Founder Lifetime adalah penawaran peluncuran terbatas: 99 € sekali bayar dan kamu memakai AdOff Pro selamanya, termasuk semua pembaruan mendatang, di semua perangkat pribadimu. Tanpa perpanjangan tahunan, tanpa kejutan, lencana Founder termasuk. Saat kuota Founder habis, penawaran ditarik.
faq.a5: Ya. Zero Log Policy: AdOff tidak mengumpulkan data tentang penelusuran Anda. Kami tidak tahu situs mana yang Anda kunjungi, apa yang Anda cari, berapa lama Anda berada di halaman. Penghitung, whitelist, dan preferensi tetap di perangkat Anda, dalam chrome.storage.local. Satu-satunya komunikasi dengan server kami adalah validasi lisensi Pro (kunci + email). Kodenya dapat diperiksa sebelum instalasi. Kami GDPR compliant by design, bukan demi keharusan.
faq.a7: Tidak, sebaliknya: itu membuatnya lebih cepat. AdOff sangat ringan (sebagian kecil dari berat blocker lain) dan menggunakan filter asinkron yang tidak memblokir thread utama browser. Anda bahkan mungkin memperhatikan peningkatan kecepatan.
faq.a8: Ya. AdOff dipublikasikan di saluran resmi (Chrome Web Store, Firefox Add-ons, Safari App Store, Edge Add-ons) dan menjalani tinjauan keamanan sebelum dirilis. Sebelum instalasi, Anda dapat memeriksa kodenya di GitHub (repositori publik).
faq.a9: Ya. Free: pemblokiran jaringan dan filter kosmetik bekerja di setiap situs. Pro: netralisasi video bekerja di platform streaming yang menggunakan SDK standar, dan Stealth Mode (anti-deteksi) tersedia di situs dengan sistem anti-adblock.

inspect.body: Sebuah ad blocker harus membaca halaman untuk menghapus iklan: itulah sebabnya ia meminta izin mengakses data situs. Tetapi pembacaan terjadi hanya di perangkatmu. Tidak ada yang keluar dari browser. Kamu tak perlu sekadar percaya: kode inti (pemblokiran jaringan, filter kosmetik, content script) terbaca, tidak diobfuskasi. Kamu bisa membongkar paketnya dan memeriksanya sendiri.
inspect.label: Transparansi, bukan janji
inspect.note: Validasi lisensi Pro terjadi di server terpisah dan privat: perlindungan produk adalah lisensi source-available (kamu boleh membaca dan memakainya; jangan menjualnya kembali sebagai produk pesaing) + server, bukan obfuskasi kode.

premium.bundle.title: AdBlock + VPN costs less than VPN alone

free for 15 days
premium.faq.browser.a: No. Browser-based VPN extensions have fundamental limitations: they can only route traffic from that specific browser tab, not from other apps or system services on your device. AdOff Premium uses dedicated mobile and desktop apps that tunnel all your device traffic — every app, every browser, every service. This is how real VPNs work.
premium.faq.browser.q: Is the VPN inside the browser?
premium.faq.devices.a: Up to 3 personal devices per Premium subscription. The VPN apps are available for Android (at launch) and desktop platforms (post-launch). The browser extension covers all your browsers regardless.
premium.faq.devices.q: How many devices can I use?
premium.faq.ends.a: When your Premium subscription ends or is cancelled, your VPN account is disabled immediately. The AdBlock Pro features you had active (trial or Pro) continue independently. Refunds are handled pro-rata for unused days — contact support.
premium.faq.ends.q: What happens when my subscription ends?
premium.faq.founder.a: The first 100 Premium subscribers at the Founder price (€29.99 for the first year, then €49.99/year) get a dedicated Founder Premium badge and the locked-in first-year rate. This is a separate pool from the AdBlock Founder seats — you can be a Premium Founder even if you're not an AdBlock Founder.
premium.faq.founder.q: What is the Founder Premium pool?
premium.faq.label: FAQ
premium.faq.logs.a: We log only: (1) whether your VPN account is active, and (2) the last timestamp you connected to the VPN (for the 7-day auto-disable feature). We do not log browsing history, visited sites, downloads, source/destination IPs, bandwidth, or any traffic data. Read the full VPN Policy for details.
premium.faq.logs.q: What does the VPN log, exactly?
premium.faq.p2p.a: Yes. P2P and BitTorrent traffic are allowed on AdOff Premium VPN, including on dedicated P2P-optimized servers. All usage must be for lawful purposes. See the VPN Policy for the full terms.
premium.faq.title: Questions about Premium
premium.faq.trial.a: The trial gives you the full AdBlock Pro experience: all ad blocking, video ad neutralization, and Stealth anti-detection. The VPN activates when you subscribe to Premium. This keeps the trial simple and the VPN cost-free until you decide.
premium.faq.trial.q: Does the 15-day free trial include the VPN?
premium.faq.upgrade.a: Yes. You can upgrade from Pro to Premium at any time. Your unused Pro days are credited pro-rata and applied to the Premium subscription cost. Contact support to upgrade, or use the upgrade option in your account dashboard.
premium.faq.upgrade.q: Can I upgrade from Pro to Premium?

premium.hero.vpnNote: The VPN runs on your mobile and desktop apps, not in the browser. You download the app, connect, and your real IP is hidden on every app and browser on that device.

This is the only way to route all device traffic through the tunnel — including apps, other browsers, and system services. undetectable_ad_blocker.anti.adblock.sys: Anti-adblock systems plant decoy ad elements and check whether they get hidden, fire test requests to ad servers and check whether they're blocked, and probe for ad-related JavaScript globals. A normal blocker reacts to all of these in a way the page
undetectable_ad_blocker.being.undetectab: Being undetectable means passing those probes as if no blocker were present: the decoy element looks visible, the test requests look answered, the expected globals exist. AdOff operates in the page's main execution context and spoofs the bait element

undetectable_ad_blocker.the.result.ads.a: >The result: ads are removed at the network and cosmetic level, but the probes come back normal. No wall, no nag.
undetectable_ad_blocker.use.a.blocker.wi: >Use a blocker with a dedicated stealth layer that runs in the page context and masks bait elements, test requests, and detection variables. AdOff includes this in its Pro and trial tiers.
undetectable_ad_blocker.usually.yes.most: >Usually yes. Most blockers leave measurable traces. A stealth ad blocker like AdOff spoofs those signals so detection scripts see nothing unusual.
